tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall addr
    edit "UbuntuComputer"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS"
        set tcp-portrange 53
        set udp-portrange 53
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Block-UbuntuComputer-DNS-Egress"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}
